password_min_chars: Password must be at least 8 characters.
login_subtitle: Sign in to your account to continue
register_subtitle: Create your account and start learning
register_success_msg: Your account has been created successfully.
forgot_subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password
forgot_sent_msg: If {{email}} is registered, you will receive an email shortly with a link to reset your password. Also check your spam folder. Be patient, the email usually takes 2 to 3 minutes.
reset_subtitle: Enter your new password. It must be at least 8 characters.
reset_invalid_msg: This link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one from the login page.
reset_success_msg: You can now sign in with your new password.
profile_update_msg: Your profile has been updated successfully.
profile_delete_msg: Your account has been deleted successfully.
profile_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account? Your personal data will be permanently deleted, but your progress will be kept anonymously for educational research purposes.
welcome_subtitle: Your teaching assistant to learn programming step by step.
welcome_login_prompt: Sign in to start interacting with Codi.
home_footer: Codi is an AI educational support tool and may make mistakes. For any questions or issues, contact your course instructor.
